title: bloxd.io 8x8
body:
# bloxd.io 8x8 pack
**Download the most recent version. It will have more textures**  
This resource pack makes Minecraft look like the online game bloxd.io  
Also works as an "8x8 bare bones" pack  
New bloxd-style textures will be created for blocks that are not in bloxd.io  
### Request textures that you want to see in the next release [here](https://discord.gg/QzMT9cYHmk)  
All Netherite textures have been retextured to moonstone textures.  

## What do the letters next to the version mean?  
R - Ready to use  
B - Buggy, but still usable  
A - Actually unplayable
